title: Introduce Captain executor registry
goal: Replace ad-hoc captain-run executor branching with a single executor registry that is the source of truth for executable actions and executor metadata.

acceptance.assertion: CAPTAIN_EXECUTABLE_ACTIONS is derived from the executor registry rather than maintained separately.
Registry entries declare action name, mutating status, required target fields, verification strategy and non-claims.
The refactor does not add deploy, restart, fleet mutation, cleanup or secret authority.
Tests cover registry/action allowlist consistency and unsupported-action fail-closed behavior.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #102 and #104 left pr-merge as a hard-coded executor branch.
